channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Dirty nickel: The cost of mining in Indonesia
item.description: Across six locations in Indonesia, NPR spoke with locals about how nickel mining is changing the land and daily life. It's brought jobs, but also conc...

item.title: Border czar promises 'mass deportations are coming' to fulfill Trump's promises
item.description: The remarks contrast with Border Czar Tom Homan's softer messaging earlier this year, after two U.S. citizens were killed by immigration officials in ...

item.title: Gas prices keep rising, but do big oil companies plan to drill more? Not so far
item.description: The war in Iran has pushed global oil prices higher, which boosts oil company revenues. But major U.S. oil companies aren't signaling plans to increas...

item.title: As federal scientists faced turmoil, the Devils Hole pupfish reached a crisis point
item.description: The Devils hole pupfish lives in just one spot in Death Valley. Wildlife officials have managed this iconic fish for decades, and last spring, just as...
